subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and its contents were redolent with spirit and fragrance. Render thou thanks unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبت ملحوظ گردید مضمون بروح و ریحان مشحون بود حمد کن خدا
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
